problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Viral. Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
